Smithers, BC — Bulkley Valley

Growing Beautiful Spaces in the Bulkley Valley

Metta Growing brings passionate, hands-on landscaping to Smithers and surrounding communities. From lush garden installations to striking patios, we transform outdoor spaces with care rooted in this land.

What We Do

Full-Service Landscaping

From first consultation to finished project, Metta Growing handles every aspect of your outdoor transformation.

Patio & Hardscaping

Patio & Hardscaping

Stunning paver patios, garden pathways, and stone features built to last through Bulkley Valley winters.

  • Paver & cobblestone installation
  • Custom pathway design
  • Proper base preparation
  • Finishing & sealing
Learn More
Lawn Care

Lawn Care & Maintenance

Keep your lawn healthy and green all season with regular mowing, aeration, fertilizing, and expert care.

  • Weekly & bi-weekly mowing
  • Aeration & overseeding
  • Fertilizing programs
  • Seasonal upkeep
Learn More
Plant Starts

Plant Starts & Seedlings

Indoor-grown starts for herbs, vegetables, and ornamentals — perfectly timed for northern BC's short growing season.

  • Herbs & vegetables
  • Ornamental flowers
  • Custom seed-starting orders
  • Hardy varieties for Zone 3-4
Learn More
View All 6 Services
5+
Years Growing
the Valley
Our Story

Rooted in Smithers,
Growing with You

Metta Growing was born from a deep love of this land. Owner Alana Brinnen grew up surrounded by the wild beauty of the Bulkley Valley, and after years of honing her craft, she set out to bring that same natural vitality into the yards and gardens of her neighbours.

Every project we take on is personal. Whether it's a backyard patio for family gatherings, a fresh garden bed, or a carefully tended commercial planter in downtown Smithers — we bring the same hands-on care and local knowledge to every job.

We know what plants survive a Bulkley Valley winter. We know the soil. We know the seasons. That's the Metta Growing difference.

Our Full Story
Simple Process

How We Work

From first conversation to finished project, we make it easy and stress-free.

01

Free Consultation

We visit your property, listen to your vision, and assess what's possible. Zero pressure, no cost.

02

Design & Plan

We put together a clear proposal with scope, timeline, and pricing — no surprises.

03

We Do the Work

Our crew shows up on time, works cleanly, and communicates throughout the project.

04

You Enjoy the Results

We do a final walkthrough together. You get a beautiful outdoor space and our ongoing support.

Book Your Free Consultation
Happy Clients

What Our Clients Say

"Alana completely transformed our backyard. The patio she installed is absolutely stunning — the cobblestone work is professional grade and it holds up beautifully through our winters. She was easy to work with, on schedule, and genuinely cared about the result."
S
Sandra M.
Smithers, BC
"We hired Metta Growing for a spring cleanup and garden bed installation. They showed up exactly when promised, did meticulous work, and suggested plants we'd never heard of that are perfect for our zone. Will absolutely be calling again this fall."
D
Dave & Karen T.
Telkwa, BC
"I ordered basil and tomato starts from Alana this spring and they were the healthiest seedlings I've ever planted. Strong root systems, no transplant shock, and they produced all season. Already pre-ordered for next year."
T
Tom B.
Houston, BC
